description: Import a 2D DXF profile of a NEMA 17 stepper motor gasket from '~/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_damper_profile.dxf', extrude it to a thickness of exactly 2.0 mm, and export it for 3D printing. Save the parametric model as '~/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_damper_3d.slvs' and export the 3D triangle mesh as '~/Documents/SolveSpace/nema17_damper_3d.stl'.
